headline: Crafting Meaningful Brands & Intuitive Experiences
bio: Hey, I'm Bian, a UI/UX and brand designer passionate about creating visually compelling and user-friendly digital experiences.

With a keen eye for aesthetics and a deep understanding of user behavior, I design brands and interfaces that not only look great but also resonate with audiences. Whether it's building a brand identity from scratch, designing a digital product for mobile, or refining an existing design — I blend strategy, creativity, and functionality to bring ideas to life.
Let's collaborate and make something extraordinary.
